title: ATLAS · Mutual fund NAV timeseries
description: MF NAV timeseries fixture (frontend-v1 spec §10.5.7 — `ppfas_flexi_nav_5y.json` sample). Consumed by MF detail (§8) performance chart and by the §10.5 Signal Playback embed when the instrument is a mutual fund. Stage 2 source: `/api/v1/mf/{id}/nav-history?range=5y`. One row per NAV publication day (T+1 for most schemes). Values are Decimal-representable to 4 decimal places.

fund_id.description: Internal ATLAS fund identifier. Stable across NAV publications. Slug form preferred.

scheme_code.description: AMFI / BSE scheme code (ISIN or AMFI numeric code, uppercase). Example ISIN: `INF879O01027`.

fund_name.description: Full scheme name as registered with AMFI.
examples: Parag Parikh Flexi Cap Fund - Direct Plan - Growth

category.description: SEBI scheme category, normalised to ATLAS taxonomy (matches MF Rank filter rail in spec §9).

benchmark_id.description: Canonical benchmark for this scheme. Used by MF detail alpha overlay and Signal Playback B&H comparison.

data_as_of.description: Most recent NAV date in this fixture (ISO YYYY-MM-DD, IST).

series.description: Daily NAV rows, chronologically ascending. Typical 5Y sample is approximately 1,250 rows (one per business day on which NAV is published). Gaps allowed only when AMFI did not publish (holidays) — consumers must not fill forward silently.

nav.description: End-of-day NAV in rupees, to 4 decimal places. Decimal-representable — never stored as float.

nav_tri.description: Optional TRI variant used for benchmark indices (reinvested-dividend series). Present on index fixtures, typically absent on active equity MF NAV.

aum_crore.description: Optional AUM snapshot in ₹ crore on this `date`. Published monthly by AMCs so most daily rows will omit this field.
